# Pink Friday 2

Official streaming and purchase guide for Pink Friday 2 by Nicki Minaj.

## About

This website provides links to stream, purchase, and support Pink Friday 2 and its related editions through authorized music retailers and digital music platforms.

## Resources

* Nicki Minaj Official Website
* iTunes
* Amazon Music
* Qobuz
* 7Digital
* Vinyl Editions
* CD Editions

## Official Artist Website

https://www.nickiminajofficial.com/

## Website

https://pinkfriday2.netlify.app/
